prompts: Extract the key points from the transcription

utterances.text: Are you excited for your first day?
Everyone feels that way on the first day.
You'll make lots of friends soon.
What do you like to do for fun?
I like to draw and play with my toys.
We have an art corner in our classroom.
Would you like to see it later?
Do you have any favorite colors?
You can use them in your drawings.
my mom reads me bedtime stories.
We'll read lots of stories in class too.
Do we get to play too?
we have playtime and outdoor activities every day.
Do you have any questions about school?
I'll show you where it is later.
what will we do first today?
and then do a fun activity.
You can draw something that makes you happy.
Do you want to help me pass out the crayons?
I think I'm going to like this class.
I'm so glad to hear that.
We're going to have a great year together.

transcription.full_transcript: WowLearn kids! An educational channel. Good morning. Welcome to our class. What's your name? Good morning. My name is Sam. Nice to meet you, Sam. I'm Ms. Johnson. Are you excited for your first day? A little bit, but I'm also nervous. That's okay. Everyone feels that way on the first day. Do you know anyone here? No, I don't know anyone yet. Don't worry. You'll make lots of friends soon. What do you like to do for fun? I like to draw and play with my toys. That sounds fun. We have an art corner in our classroom. Would you like to see it later? Yes, I love drawing. Great. Do you have any favorite colors? Yes, I love blue and green. Those are wonderful colors. You can use them in your drawings. Yay! I can't wait. What else do you enjoy? Do you like reading stories? Yes, my mom reads me bedtime stories. That's wonderful. We'll read lots of stories in class too. Cool! Do we get to play too? Of course, we have playtime and outdoor activities every day. That sounds fun! I'm glad you think so. Do you have any questions about school? Um, where do we eat lunch? Good question. We eat in the cafeteria. I'll show you where it is later. Okay, what will we do first today? First, we will introduce ourselves. and then do a fun activity. What kind of activity? A Coloring Activity You can draw something that makes you happy. That sounds awesome! I'm happy you're excited. Do you want to help me pass out the crayons? Yes, I would love to help. Thank you, Sam. You're a great helper. You're welcome. I think I'm going to like this class. I'm so glad to hear that. We're going to have a great year together. Yay! I can't wait to start! Let's begin, then.

results.prompt: Extract the key points from the transcription
results.response:
The key points from the transcription are:
- Introduction between Sam and Ms. Johnson on the first day of class.
- Sam's interests in drawing, playing with toys, and reading stories.
- Discussion about favorite colors (blue and green) and plans to use them in drawings.
- Mention of playtime, outdoor activities, and lunch in the cafeteria.
- Planned activities for the day, including introducing themselves and a coloring activity.
- Sam's excitement and willingness to help in class activities.
- Overall positive interaction and anticipation for a great year ahead.

summarization.results: The conversation is between a teacher and a new student named Sam. The teacher, Ms. Johnson, welcomes Sam to the class and helps him feel comfortable by discussing his interests in drawing, favorite colors, and reading stories. Sam is excited about the art corner, playtime, and outdoor activities. The teacher plans a coloring activity for the first day to help the students introduce themselves and have fun. Sam is eager to start and looks forward to a great year ahead.
